doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The core 5-day demand requirement matches the real 735 ILCS 5/9-209, but service-method details and the email service clause appear paraphrased or embellished rather than verbatim official statutory text.
